sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.dueDate,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,ws.stageName,COALESCE(u.displayName,team.teamName,r.roleName,'Unassigned') AS assigneeName,CASE WHEN t.assignedToUserId IS NOT NULL THEN 'user' WHEN t.assignedToTeamId IS NOT NULL THEN 'team' WHEN t.assignedToRoleId IS NOT NULL THEN 'role' ELSE 'unassigned' END AS assigneeType,CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isOverdue,CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking') AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND p.status='not_started'))) AS UNSIGNED) AS startBlockerCount,CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND d.dependencyType='finish_to_finish' AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) AS UNSIGNED) AS finishBlockerCount,(SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT p.taskName ORDER BY p.id SEPARATOR ', ') FROM tbl_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_tasks p ON p.id=d.dependsOnTaskId AND p.workflowId=t.workflowId AND p.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE d.taskId=t.id AND d.workflowId=t.workflowId AND d.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((d.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking','finish_to_finish') AND p.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (d.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND p.status='not_started'))) AS blockerNames FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=t.assignedToUserId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams team ON team.id=t.assignedToTeamId AND team.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=t.assignedToRoleId WHERE t.tenantId=:tenantId AND (:viewAll='all' OR (:viewMy='my' AND t.assignedToUserId=:userId) OR (:viewTeam='team' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_team_members member INNER JOIN tbl_user_tenant_roles membership ON membership.id=member.tenantUserId AND membership.tenantId=member.tenantId AND membership.isActive=1 WHERE member.teamId=t.assignedToTeamId AND member.tenantId=t.tenantId AND membership.userId=:teamUserId AND member.isActive=1)) OR (:viewUnassigned='unassigned' AND t.assignedToUserId IS NULL AND t.assignedToTeamId IS NULL AND t.assignedToRoleId IS NULL)) AND (:searchEmpty='' OR CONCAT_WS(' ',t.taskName,t.description,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,ws.stageName,COALESCE(u.displayName,team.teamName,r.roleName,'')) LIKE CONCAT('%',:searchText,'%')) AND (:workflowId=0 OR t.workflowId=:workflowId2) AND (:statusAll='all' OR (:statusOpen='open' AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR t.status=:statusExact) AND (:priorityEmpty='' OR t.priority=:priorityExact) AND (:dueEmpty='' OR (:dueOverdue='overdue' AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (:dueToday='today' AND DATE(t.dueDate)=CURRENT_DATE) OR (:dueSoon='soon' AND t.dueDate BETWEEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,INTERVAL 7 DAY)) OR (:dueNone='none' AND t.dueDate IS NULL)) AND (:blockedEmpty='' OR (:blockedYes='blocked' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_task_dependencies fd INNER JOIN tbl_tasks fp ON fp.id=fd.dependsOnTaskId AND fp.workflowId=t.workflowId AND fp.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE fd.taskId=t.id AND fd.workflowId=t.workflowId AND fd.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((fd.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking','finish_to_finish') AND fp.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (fd.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND fp.status='not_started')))) OR (:blockedReady='ready' AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_task_dependencies rd INNER JOIN tbl_tasks rp ON rp.id=rd.dependsOnTaskId AND rp.workflowId=t.workflowId AND rp.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE rd.taskId=t.id AND rd.workflowId=t.workflowId AND rd.tenantId=t.tenantId AND ((rd.dependencyType IN ('finish_to_start','blocking','finish_to_finish') AND rp.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled')) OR (rd.dependencyType='start_to_start' AND rp.status='not_started'))))) ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,CASE WHEN t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,t.dueDate IS NULL,t.dueDate,FIELD(t.priority,'urgent','high','normal','low'),t.id DESC LIMIT 250
